title: PERF-17 + PERF-21: Adaptive Clover reconciliation & SSE connection lifetime cap
content:
Implemented two performance improvements:

PERF-17 (Adaptive Clover reconciliation): Replaced fixed setInterval(30_000) with a self-rescheduling setTimeout loop. Polls every 15s for 2 minutes after a Clover payment is initiated, then drops back to 120s. Extracted shared signal state into new clover-reconcile-signal.ts service to avoid circular imports between server.ts and dashboard-orders.ts.

PERF-21 (SSE dead-listener cleanup): Added MAX_CONNECTION_MS = 24h ceiling to the SSE heartbeat loop. On ungraceful TCP disconnects, kernel buffering can make heartbeat writes appear to succeed indefinitely. The 24h cap ensures the listener is always reaped; browser EventSource auto-reconnects within ~3s.
